title: Communauté de communes de la Bassée - Montois
summary: The Communauté de communes de la Bassée - Montois is a communauté de communes in the Seine-et-Marne département and in the Île-de-France région of France. It was formed on 1 January 2014 by the merger of the former Communauté de communes de la Bassée and the Communauté de communes du Montois. Its seat is in Donnemarie-Dontilly. Its area is 421.8 km2, and its population was 23,230 in 2019.
text:
The Communauté de communes de la Bassée - Montois is a communauté de communes in the Seine-et-Marne département and in the Île-de-France région of France. It was formed on 1 January 2014 by the merger of the former Communauté de communes de la Bassée and the Communauté de communes du Montois. Its seat is in Donnemarie-Dontilly. Its area is 421.8 km2, and its population was 23,230 in 2019.

Composition
The communauté de communes consists of the following 42 communes:
